MEDB71PsychStatusNASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for preflight behavioral health assessment. Captures psychiatric/psychological assessment of behavioral readiness for flight and review of psychological services.Questionnairehttps://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/Questionnaire/medb-7-1-psych-status#0.5.9
overviewMedical Requirements Overview0..1group
overview.mrid-numberMRID Number and Title0..1displayInitial Value: string = MEDB 7.1 Preflight Psychiatric/Psychological Status Check
overview.sponsorSponsor1..1choiceOptions: 1 option
Initial Value: Coding = NASA MRID Sponsor Organizations#bhp "Behavioral Health and Performance"
overview.disciplineDiscipline1..1choiceOptions: 1 option
Initial Value: Coding = NASA MRID Medical Disciplines#behavioral "Behavior and Performance"
overview.categoryCategory1..1stringInitial Value: string = Medical Requirements (MR)
overview.referencesReferences0..1textInitial Value: string = Medical Evaluation Documents (MED) Volume B, Section 7.1; ISS MORD
overview.purposePurpose/Objectives1..1textInitial Value: string = Psychiatric/Psychological assessment of behavioral readiness for flight. Review of individual and crew psychological services.
overview.measurement-parametersMeasurement Parameters0..1stringInitial Value: string = N/A
overview.deliverablesDeliverables0..1stringInitial Value: string = N/A
overview.flight-durationFlight Duration1..1stringInitial Value: string = >= 30 days
overview.number-of-flightsNumber of Flights1..1stringInitial Value: string = Each ISS long duration expedition
overview.crew-members-requiredNumber and Type of Crew Members Required1..1stringInitial Value: string = All ISS crewmembers
preflight-trainingPreflight Training0..1group
preflight-training.naNo Preflight Training Required0..1display
preflight-activitiesPreflight Activities0..1group
preflight-activities.descriptionActivity Description0..1textInitial Value: string = An assessment of crew flight readiness is conducted by BHP personnel. Preflight briefings between the crewmembers & BHP specialist are required to confirm behavioral readiness for flight & review of individual & crew psychological services. This will include a check of life events that would have an impact on the astronaut's fitness for launch. Behavioral Medicine Assessments to include Neurocognitive baseline and Behavioral health baseline needed for in flight monitoring to be completed between L-12 and launch.
preflight-activities.assessment1Behavioral Medicine Assessment 10..1group
preflight-activities.assessment1.durationDuration (minutes)1..1integerInitial Value: integer = 60
preflight-activities.assessment1.scheduleSchedule1..1stringInitial Value: string = L-12 m, L-240/180 d
preflight-activities.assessment1.dateAssessment Date0..1date
preflight-activities.assessment1.completedAssessment Completed1..1boolean
preflight-activities.assessment2Behavioral Medicine Assessment 20..1group
preflight-activities.assessment2.durationDuration (minutes)1..1integerInitial Value: integer = 60
preflight-activities.assessment2.scheduleSchedule1..1stringInitial Value: string = L-90/30 days
preflight-activities.assessment2.dateAssessment Date0..1date
preflight-activities.assessment2.completedAssessment Completed1..1boolean
preflight-activities.flexibilityFlexibility0..1stringInitial Value: string = May be conducted over 2 days between L-90/30
preflight-activities.personnelPersonnel Required1..*choiceOptions: 2 options
preflight-activities.locationTest Location1..1choiceOptions: 2 options
preflight-activities.room-requirementsRoom Requirements0..1stringInitial Value: string = 8' x 10' private room free of distractions
preflight-activities.constraintsConstraints/Special Requirements0..1textInitial Value: string = Request that the L-90/30 event be scheduled as close as possible to the crewmember's final departure from the US prior to their Soyuz launch.
assessment-resultsBehavioral Assessment Results0..1group
assessment-results.behavioral-readinessBehavioral Readiness for Flight1..1choiceOptions: 4 options
assessment-results.neurocognitive-baselineNeurocognitive Baseline Completed1..1boolean
assessment-results.behavioral-baselineBehavioral Health Baseline Completed1..1boolean
assessment-results.life-events-reviewLife Events Review Completed1..1boolean

assessment-results.crew-services-reviewCrew Psychological Services Reviewed1..1boolean

behavioral-metrics.cognitive-readinessCognitive Readiness for Mission0..1choiceOptions: 4 options
behavioral-metrics.social-connectednessSocial Connectedness (with crew/family)0..1choiceOptions: 4 options

inflight-activities.naNo In-Flight Activities0..1display
postflight-activitiesPostflight Activities0..1group
postflight-activities.naNo Postflight Activities0..1display
data-deliveryData Delivery0..1group
data-delivery.data-controlData Control0..1textInitial Value: string = Data are crew member controlled. The crewmember is the designated recipient of the data and sharing this information is at his/her discretion.
data-delivery.emr-entryEMR Entry Made1..1boolean
data-delivery.emr-entry-notesEMR Entry Notes0..1textInitial Value: string = Entries will be made in the EMR for each event showing completion of the MEDB requirement and stating if any aeromedical concerns were identified.

extension.valueString: The astronaut/crewmember subject of this medical requirement

name: MEDB71PsychStatus
title: MEDB 7.1 Preflight Psychiatric/Psychological Status Check
description: NASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for preflight behavioral health assessment. Captures psychiatric/psychological assessment of behavioral readiness for flight and review of psychological services.
purpose: Psychiatric/Psychological assessment of behavioral readiness for flight. Review of individual and crew psychological services.
copyright: NASA Johnson Space Center - Medical Requirements Integration Documents (MRIDs) JSC28913

initial.valueString: Medical Evaluation Documents (MED) Volume B, Section 7.1; ISS MORD
Psychiatric/Psychological assessment of behavioral readiness for flight. Review of individual and crew psychological services.

item.text: Number and Type of Crew Members Required

initial.valueString: An assessment of crew flight readiness is conducted by BHP personnel. Preflight briefings between the crewmembers & BHP specialist are required to confirm behavioral readiness for flight & review of individual & crew psychological services. This will include a check of life events that would have an impact on the astronaut's fitness for launch. Behavioral Medicine Assessments to include Neurocognitive baseline and Behavioral health baseline needed for in flight monitoring to be completed between L-12 and launch.
May be conducted over 2 days between L-90/30
8' x 10' private room free of distractions
Request that the L-90/30 event be scheduled as close as possible to the crewmember's final departure from the US prior to their Soyuz launch.

item.text: Life Events with Potential Impact Identified

initial.valueString: Data are crew member controlled. The crewmember is the designated recipient of the data and sharing this information is at his/her discretion.
Entries will be made in the EMR for each event showing completion of the MEDB requirement and stating if any aeromedical concerns were identified.
